name: Strawberry Floating Islands
recipeIngredient: 1 pint strawberries or 1 pkg frozen strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 1/4 cup sugar with cornstarch and salt in a quart casserole dish.
2. Stir in milk, then blend in egg yolks.
3. Cook on medium-high for 2-1/2 to 5 minutes, stirring until it coats the back of a metal spoon.
4. Mix with a whisk a couple of times.
5. Chill and stir in vanilla just before serving.
6. Divide berries into four dishes.
7. Beat egg whites until foamy.
8. Gradually beat in sugar 1 tablespoon at a time until stiff peaks form.
9. Beat in 1/2 teaspoon vanilla.
10. Pour chilled custard over berries and top with meringue.
11. Cook on medium-high for 45 seconds to 1 minute, or until the meringues are set. If no turntable is available in the microwave, rearrange during cooking.
